body_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, attached is Invoice #{NUM} totaling {AMOUNT} for {DEPT} services rendered through {DATE}. Our records show PO #{CASE} was issued in advance. Could you confirm receipt and let us know the expected payment processing date? We are happy to provide any backup documentation needed. Please reach us at {PHONE} if questions arise.
reply_tmpl: Thanks for sending this over. Invoice #{NUM} has been logged and forwarded to Accounts Payable. Expect payment within {DAYS} business days per our standard net-30 terms. I will email a remittance once processed.

body_tmpl: {FIRST} — We noticed a discrepancy between Village PO #{NUM} (amount {AMOUNT}) and our submitted invoice for the same period. Our records show additional work at {ADDRESS} was authorized verbally on {DATE}. Could you clarify whether a change-order PO will be issued, or whether we should revise the invoice? We want to make sure everything reconciles properly before month-end.

Good afternoon. {BIZ} is interested in submitting a bid for the {STREET} resurfacing project. A few pre-bid questions: (1) Is core-drilling data from {DATE} still current? (2) Will the Village accept unit-price alternates on ADA ramp work? (3) What is the anticipated NTP date? We would appreciate clarification before the {DATE} submission deadline.
reply_tmpl: Core data from {DATE} remains valid. ADA ramp alternates are acceptable with separate line-item pricing. Anticipated NTP is within 30 days of award. All questions and answers will be posted as an addendum to the bid portal by {DATE}.

body_tmpl: We are preparing our response to the Village of Bellwood Grounds Maintenance RFP issued {DATE}. We have two questions: Does the scope include snow-removal services at Metra station right-of-way, or only Village-owned parcels? Also, is prevailing wage required for all labor categories? Please advise so we can properly price our proposal. Submission deadline is {DATE}.

Hi {FIRST}, our current service agreement for {DEPT} support expires on {DATE}. We are reaching out early to discuss renewal terms. The attached proposal maintains the same scope at a {AMOUNT} annual rate — a 3% increase reflecting CPI adjustment per Section 7 of the existing contract. Please let us know if a renewal meeting would be helpful or if you'd prefer we route this directly through procurement.
reply_tmpl: Thanks for the early notice. I'm copying Finance and will schedule a brief review meeting in the next two weeks. We appreciate the continued partnership.

body_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, {BIZ} has provided snow-removal services to Bellwood for the past {DAYS} seasons and we hope to continue the partnership. Attached is our renewal proposal for the upcoming winter season. Pricing reflects current fuel and equipment costs. We are available to meet at your convenience to walk through the proposal. Please respond by {DATE} so we can finalize scheduling before the first anticipated storm event.

{FIRST}, my name is {NAME} with {BIZ}. We specialize in utility billing and permit-management software used by {NUM} Illinois municipalities. I'd welcome the chance to introduce our platform and show how it has helped comparable communities reduce processing time and improve resident satisfaction. Could we schedule a 30-minute call at your convenience? I can be reached at {PHONE} or via this email.
reply_tmpl: Thank you for reaching out. Please contact our Village Clerk to get on the agenda for the next department-heads meeting, where vendor introductions are reviewed.

subject_tmpl: New Supplier Introduction — {BIZ} — Water Main Materials
body_tmpl: Good morning. {BIZ} is a certified MBE supplier of ductile-iron pipe, fittings, and hydrant components. We are currently supplying {NUM} Cook County municipalities and would welcome an opportunity to quote on Bellwood's upcoming water-main replacement projects. I have attached our product catalog and current pricing sheet. Please let me know if you would like samples or a site visit at {ADDRESS}.

{FIRST} — Please find our updated Certificate of Insurance attached, effective {DATE}. Coverage limits meet the requirements specified in Section 4 of our agreement: GL {AMOUNT}, auto liability, and workers' comp. Our broker has named the Village of Bellwood as additional insured. Let us know if Risk Management needs any endorsements or if the certificate should also be sent to another contact.
reply_tmpl: COI received and forwarded to our Risk Management file. Everything appears in order. Thank you.

body_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, this is a reminder that the Certificate of Insurance on file for {BIZ} expires {DATE}. Our insurance carrier is processing renewal and we expect updated documentation by {DATE}. We wanted to alert you proactively so there is no lapse affecting active work orders on {STREET}. We will email the new certificate as soon as it is available.

Hello, I am following up on permit application #{CASE} submitted on {DATE} for interior build-out at {ADDRESS}. We are on a tight contractor schedule and the GC is asking whether a plan-review comment letter has been issued. Could someone provide a status update? My contact is {PHONE}. Thank you for your help.
reply_tmpl: Permit #{CASE} is in second-round plan review. Comments are expected to be issued by {DATE}. Please resubmit revised drawings within {DAYS} days of receipt.

body_tmpl: We are opening a new location at {ADDRESS} and need a signage permit for a wall-mounted illuminated sign, approximately {NUM} square feet. Our sign contractor, {BIZ}, will pull the permit but wanted to confirm dimensional allowances under the Village sign code for a {STREET} commercial corridor before fabricating. Can you point us to the relevant code section or provide a quick confirmation?

{FIRST} — We have received Invoice #{NUM} from {BIZ} for {AMOUNT} related to the {STREET} project. Before AP can cut the check, I need your written approval confirming the work was completed satisfactorily. Can you respond by {DATE} so we don't miss the payment cycle? Just a quick reply email is sufficient.
reply_tmpl: Work confirmed complete as of {DATE}. Approved for payment.

body_tmpl: {FIRST}, the {DEPT} contract with {BIZ} is projected to exceed its approved budget by {AMOUNT} due to supplemental work orders authorized in {DATE}. I need a budget-amendment memo drafted for the next Village Board meeting. The additional scope was necessary to address unexpected conditions at {STREET}. Please let me know what backup documentation you need from Public Works.

Karen — Bids were received on {DATE} for the {STREET} drainage improvement project. {BIZ} submitted the low responsive bid of {AMOUNT}, which is {NUM}% below the engineer's estimate. I have reviewed their qualifications and references and recommend award. A board resolution and draft contract are attached for your review. Anticipated construction start is {DATE}, weather permitting.
reply_tmpl: Thanks, Tom. I'll place this on the {DATE} board agenda. Please prepare a brief presentation slide summarizing the project scope and funding source.

body_tmpl: Karen, {BIZ} has submitted a new vendor registration form and W-9 for our approved vendor list. I've verified the FEIN and checked the Illinois Comptroller debarment database — no issues found. Their primary contact is {NAME} at {PHONE}. Pending your approval, I'll add them to the system and notify Purchasing. Let me know if you'd like me to request any additional documentation.

Hi, I am writing to renew the business license for {BIZ} located at {ADDRESS}. Our renewal fee of {AMOUNT} is enclosed with this email as an ACH payment reference #{NUM}. Please confirm receipt and advise when the renewed license certificate will be mailed or available for pickup. Our current license expires {DATE}.
reply_tmpl: Payment confirmed. Your renewed license for {BIZ} has been processed and will be mailed to {ADDRESS} within {DAYS} business days.

body_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, I am the new owner of {BIZ} at {ADDRESS}, effective {DATE}. I understand I must apply for a liquor license transfer within {DAYS} days of ownership change. Could you send me the transfer application and a list of required supporting documents? I can be reached at {PHONE}. I want to make sure we remain in compliance during the transition.

Tom — During excavation on {STREET} near {CROSS}, the crew encountered unanticipated clay overburden requiring an additional {NUM} cubic yards of select backfill. Verdi Excavating is requesting a change order for {AMOUNT}. Can you review the unit prices against the contract schedule and prepare a change-order recommendation for my signature? Work has been paused pending approval.
reply_tmpl: Unit prices check out against Schedule B. Drafting CO #3 now for {AMOUNT}; should have it to you by {DATE}. Recommend we document the field condition with photos before backfilling.

body_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, attached is our Reimbursement Request #{NUM} under the {DEPT} grant agreement for project #{CASE}. Total eligible expenditures this quarter are {AMOUNT}, supported by the invoices and payroll records in the attachment. Please review and advise if any additional documentation is required before you submit to the funding agency. We want to ensure submission before the {DATE} deadline.

David — The {STREET} water-main project reached substantial completion on {DATE}. I have issued Final Payment Certificate #{NUM} to {BIZ} for {AMOUNT}, which includes retained funds. All punch-list items have been resolved, as-built drawings have been submitted, and warranty documentation is on file. Please process payment at your earliest convenience. Lien waiver is attached.
reply_tmpl: Final payment queued for the {DATE} warrant cycle. I'll email confirmation once the check is cut.

subject_tmpl: Traffic Control Plan Approval — {BIZ} — {STREET} Utility Work
body_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, {BIZ} will be performing gas-main work on {STREET} between {CROSS} and {CROSS} beginning {DATE}. I am attaching our proposed traffic control plan for Village review and approval. Work is anticipated to take {DAYS} days. Please let me know if any modifications are required or if a pre-construction meeting is needed before we mobilize.

Karen, our SCADA maintenance contract with {BIZ} is up for renewal. Because the system is proprietary and no other vendor can service the existing equipment at the {ADDRESS} pump station, we believe sole-source procurement is warranted. I've attached our justification memo for your review. Could you confirm this approach is consistent with Village purchasing policy before I bring it to the Board?
reply_tmpl: The sole-source justification memo looks solid. Please have the Village Attorney review Section 2 before we proceed — I want to make sure the documentation is airtight for audit purposes.

body_tmpl: Please note that {BIZ} has updated our bank account for ACH payments effective {DATE}. An updated W-9 and ACH authorization form are attached. Checks mailed after {DATE} should use the new account. Please confirm receipt and update your vendor records. Our accounts receivable contact is {NAME} at {PHONE}.

Yolanda — Please add the following item to the {DATE} Village Board agenda: Award of contract to {BIZ} for {STREET} infrastructure improvements in the amount of {AMOUNT}, funded from the Capital Projects Fund. Supporting documents — engineer's recommendation, bid tab, and draft contract — are attached. Let me know if you need anything else for the packet.
reply_tmpl: Added to the {DATE} agenda as Item {NUM}. Board packet will be posted {DAYS} days prior per ordinance.

body_tmpl: Good morning. Per our conversation, {BIZ} is pleased to provide the attached quote for equipment rental from {DATE} through {DATE}. The quote includes a {NUM}-ton excavator, operator, and fuel for {AMOUNT} per day. Mobilization to {STREET} is included. Please sign and return the rental agreement by {DATE} to secure availability. Call me at {PHONE} with any questions.

subject_tmpl: Emergency Purchase Authorization — {BIZ} — Water Main Break {STREET}
body_tmpl: David — We had a water main break on {STREET} at {TIME} on {DATE} requiring immediate repair. Per our emergency purchasing policy, I authorized {BIZ} to proceed without competitive bidding. Estimated cost is {AMOUNT}. Please open a PO retroactively and set up payment. I'll have the incident report and contractor invoice to you by {DATE}.
reply_tmpl: Emergency PO #{NUM} created for {AMOUNT}. Let me know when the final invoice arrives so I can close it out.

body_tmpl: Attached is our Prevailing Wage Compliance Certification for the {STREET} project, covering the pay period ending {DATE}. All employees and subcontractors have been paid at or above the Cook County prevailing wage rates. Certified payroll records are included as Exhibit A. Please let us know if additional documentation is required for your project file.

Frank — During my site inspection on {DATE}, I identified longitudinal cracking along the centerline of the mat placed by {BIZ} on {STREET} near {CROSS}. This does not meet spec Section 406. I have issued a written deficiency notice to the contractor directing them to core the mat within {DAYS} days and propose a corrective action plan. Payment of the {AMOUNT} retainage will remain withheld pending resolution.

We are a subcontractor to the prime on Village project #{CASE} on {STREET}. We have not received payment of {AMOUNT} for work completed on {DATE}, now {DAYS} days past due. We have exhausted attempts to resolve this with the prime contractor and are writing to the Village as Owner to request intervention under the Public Construction Bond Act. Please advise on next steps.
reply_tmpl: We have received your correspondence and are forwarding it to our Village Attorney and the bonding company. We will follow up within {DAYS} business days.

body_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, all public improvements required under subdivision agreement #{CASE} for the {STREET} subdivision have been accepted by the Village engineer per the letter dated {DATE}. We are requesting release of the remaining {AMOUNT} performance bond/escrow. Please advise on the required release form or Board approval process. We are happy to provide any supplemental documentation you need.

Karen — Attached is the vendor spend report for the quarter ending {DATE}. Total expenditures were {AMOUNT}, tracking {NUM}% below budget. The top three vendors by spend were in {DEPT}, Public Works, and IT services. I've flagged two vendors whose contracts are up for renewal in the next {DAYS} days — we should discuss whether to rebid or renew. Let me know if you'd like a deeper dive on any line item.

subject_tmpl: Vendor Booth Application — {BIZ} — Taste of Bellwood
body_tmpl: Hello {FIRST}, {BIZ} would like to reserve a vendor booth at this year's Taste of Bellwood. We sell {NUM} varieties of artisanal food products and carry a {AMOUNT} product liability policy. Could you send the vendor application, booth fee schedule, and health department requirements? We've participated in {NUM} similar events and look forward to being part of Taste of Bellwood. Contact: {NAME}, {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Thanks for your interest! The vendor application and health permit checklist are attached. Booth fees are due by {DATE}. Our health officer will review food-handling documentation before approval.

body_tmpl: Attached is our redlined Professional Services Agreement for the {DEPT} engagement starting {DATE}. We have two requested changes: (1) Section 9 — limitation of liability capped at fees paid in the prior 12 months rather than contract total; (2) Section 12 — 60-day notice for termination for convenience rather than 30 days. All other terms are acceptable as presented. Please route to your attorney and advise on timing.

subject_tmpl: Bid Opening Summary — {STREET} Sewer Lining Project
body_tmpl: Karen — Bids were opened today for the {STREET} sewer lining project. We received {NUM} responsive bids ranging from {AMOUNT} to {AMOUNT}. The apparent low bidder is {BIZ}. All bids are summarized in the attached tabulation. Per purchasing policy, bids exceeding {AMOUNT} require Board approval. Tom Reyes will provide a recommendation memo by {DATE}. I'll hold the originals in the Clerk's vault.
reply_tmpl: Thanks, Yolanda. Please notify all bidders of the results per our standard letter and place the recommendation on the next Board agenda.
